name: Sheath Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the sugar and flour. Set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the butter, water, cocoa powder, buttermilk, vanilla extract, eggs, and baking soda until well blended.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Spread the batter onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 20 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
6. Allow to cool until warm before frosting with Sheath Cake Frosting.
